---
title: Porto Vecchio, maison du camping
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557423/portovecchio_20180814_ofx36c.png
description: Maison du camping à Porto Vecchio
categories: ["urbansketching"]
date: 2018/08/14
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557423/portovecchio_20180814_ofx36c.png)
